title: Krougal Recipes
description: Over 100 additional recipes for vanilla items including smelting/blasting/smoking as well as stonecutting.
body:
Over 100 additional recipes for vanilla items including smelting/blasting/smoking as well as stonecutting.
Includes achievements for recipes.
Highlights:
Common stone crafting & tools from andesite/diorite/granite/blackstone/cobbled deepslate instead of just cobblestone.
Common metal crafting from copper ingots instead of just iron ingots.
Horse armor & saddles.
Leather from rotten flesh.
Pack and unpack various blocks like clay, snow, coral.
End portal frame. Nether skull. I have tried to keep these 2 reasonable and balanced and you will need to defeat the ender dragon to craft your own portal and kill a wither to create more nether skulls. There's no free lunch here!
